senses.gloss: to remain, to be left over
to exceed or outdo (especially in virtue, merit, or worth); to outworth
to become meritorious; to become illustrious
to deem more favorable, to prefer, to favor
to make dominant, to privilege; to make distinct or prominent, to distinguish, to honor, to grace
grace, favor (especially when seen as unmerited or unconditional); courtesy
grace, favor (especially when seen as unmerited or unconditional); courtesy; a blessing, an honor, a generous gift, a bestowment
